HediffDef.label: Angry
HediffDef.description: Feeling annoyed by the inability to quickly eliminate pests, Miraboreasu unleashes her most terrifying destructive power. In this state, her melee and fire-breathing abilities are greatly enhanced, but her mood will drop for a period of time.

HediffDef.label: Fan-shaped Dragonfire
HediffDef.description: After a brief charge, Miraboreasu continuously breathes dragonfire in a fan-shaped area ahead. The dragonfire she breathes is formed by unnatural power, turning both flesh and steel to ash under her wrath.\n\nIf entering the True Power state, the fire turns blue-purple, with significantly increased damage and armor penetration.

HediffDef.label: Circular Dragonfire
HediffDef.description: After a brief charge, Miraboreasu breathes dragonfire onto the ground, which is reflected and burns everything around. The dragonfire she breathes is formed by unnatural power, turning both flesh and steel to ash under her wrath.\n\nIf entering the True Power state, the fire turns blue-purple, with significantly increased damage and armor penetration.

HediffDef.label: Fireball
HediffDef.description: Miraboreasu spits fireballs at the target location, which explode on impact and cause area damage.\n\nIf entering the True Power state, the fireballs turn blue-purple. Accuracy decreases but three fireballs are spit at once, with significantly increased damage and armor penetration.

HediffDef.label: Tail Sweep
HediffDef.description: Miraboreasu swings her tail to strike enemies in front, dealing damage to all hostile targets in a fan-shaped area. Survivors are knocked back and stunned.\n\nThis ability receives extra scaling from melee damage factor.

HediffDef.label: Dragon Charge
HediffDef.description: Using her body as a weapon, Miraboreasu charges forward rapidly, damaging the target and all buildings and enemies in her path. Although her destructive power is reduced due to her smaller size, she can still leave enemies in disarray. If a strike doesn't kill the enemy, she will automatically perform another charge.\n\nThis ability receives extra scaling from melee damage factor.

HediffDef.label: Toggle Slam/Scratch
HediffDef.description: When unarmed, Miraboreasu can switch between two melee stances: Slam and Scratch.

HediffDef.label: Aerial Maneuver
HediffDef.description: Miraboreasu uses her strong wings to rapidly gain altitude and reach a new location.

HediffDef.label: Suppressed Wrath
HediffDef.description: Since being defeated by the Master Hunter, perhaps Black Dragon will have a little reflection on her own arrogance?

HediffDef.label: Molten Steel Armor
HediffDef.description: The Black Dragon can melt the armor of its prey and attach it to the outer layer of its dragon scales, thereby enhancing its defensive capabilities.

HediffDef.label: Physical Brute Force
HediffDef.description: Compared to other ancient dragon species, the Black Dragon has slender limbs and a long body, but this cannot conceal its destructive physical strength.

HediffDef.label: Chaotic Body
HediffDef.description: Is Black Dragon's fighting skill innate or acquired through fierce battles? Perhaps it's a bit of both.
